_comment: Reference shape only. The runner emits pipeline_summary.json with these fields filled. Numeric expectations for this fixture: rows_in=3, rows_accepted=2, rows_rejected=1, direct_trade_signal_all_false=true, rolling_validated=2 (the two build-accepted rows), rolling_rejected=2 (KRX:005930 direct_trade_signal_not_false + KRX:000660 direction_invalid from rolling_extra_rows.json), rolling_duplicate_skip=1 (KRX:402340 NH 매칭 시드), rolling_to_add=1 (KRX:058470 한국투자증권).
